reason: Verified that the SuperAgent can successfully use browser tools to navigate to a URL, retrieve the page title, and report back the result.
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 — Successfully loaded the SuperAgent interface with the list of available agents displayed.
Found and clicked the "QA-20260606-020810-x0af" agent in the sidebar — Agent chat interface opened successfully showing the chat input area.

Sent message "Open a browser and go to https://example.com. Tell me the page title." — Message was entered and sent using the Send button; agent status changed to "working" and a task "Browser Page Title Lookup" was created.
Waited up to 3 minutes for a response — Agent completed the task in 14 seconds (well within the 3-minute limit).
Verified the response mentions "Example Domain" and took a screenshot — Response received shows multiple confirmations:
